name: American Airlines Group Inc.
lede: AA runs one capability center in Hyderabad. Hyderabad, covering it, built over two years.
insight: A single AA center is easy to miss and easier to misread. We track its type, functions and the people who run it, so you can decide if it belongs on your target list.

faq.q: How many people work at AA's India GCCs?
faq.a: AA's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AA's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at AA's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
